title: Anti-Addiction(防沉迷)
body:
# 简体中文
## Minecraft防沉迷资源包简介

在当今数字时代，电子游戏已成为许多玩家休闲娱乐的重要方式之一，而《我的世界》（Minecraft）凭借其独特的沙盒玩法和无限的创造空间，吸引了无数玩家沉浸其中。然而，过度沉迷游戏可能会对玩家的身心健康、学习和生活产生诸多负面影响。为了帮助玩家更好地平衡游戏与现实生活，我们精心打造了这款Minecraft防沉迷资源包。

本资源包的核心功能是通过合理限制游戏时间，引导玩家养成健康的游戏习惯。它依据Minecraft游戏内的`regional_compliancies.json`文件机制，对玩家的游玩时长进行科学规划。该文件最初是为满足部分地区的法律合规性要求而设计，用于控制游戏内的游玩计时器和提示文本。我们在此基础上进行了优化和扩展，使其能够更有效地提醒玩家注意休息，避免长时间连续游戏。

安装本资源包后，玩家在进入游戏时会看到清晰的提示信息，告知本次游戏的建议时长。随着游戏时间的推移，系统会每隔一段时间发出温馨的休息提醒，鼓励玩家暂时离开屏幕，进行适当的活动，如伸展身体、补充水分等。当玩家接近设定的游戏时长上限时，游戏界面会弹出更为明显的警告，提示玩家即将结束本次游戏。这些提示信息均采用了友好而富有亲和力的风格，旨在引导而非强制玩家合理安排游戏时间。


我们深知，游戏本身并非洪水猛兽，适度的游戏体验可以带来乐趣、激发创造力，还能培养玩家的团队协作和解决问题的能力。因此，本资源包的目标并非完全禁止玩家玩游戏，而是希望通过科学的引导和合理的限制，帮助玩家建立健康的游戏观念，让《我的世界》成为一种积极的娱乐方式，而非沉迷的源头。

在开发过程中，我们充分尊重玩家的游戏体验，确保资源包的运行不会对游戏的正常玩法和性能产生任何负面影响。同时，我们也注重保护玩家的隐私和数据安全，不会收集或泄露任何玩家的个人信息。

总之，这款Minecraft防沉迷资源包是我们在关爱玩家、倡导健康游戏理念方面的一次积极探索。我们希望它能够成为玩家与游戏之间的一座桥梁，帮助大家在享受游戏乐趣的同时，也能保持良好的生活和学习状态。让我们一起携手，共同营造一个健康、和谐的游戏环境吧！

# English
## Introduction to the Minecraft Anti-Addiction Resource Pack

In today's digital age, video games have become one of the most important ways for many players to have fun, and Minecraft has attracted countless players to immerse themselves with its unique sandbox gameplay and unlimited creative space. However, over-indulging in games can have a number of negative effects on a player's physical and mental health, learning, and life. To help players better balance gaming with real life, we've crafted this Minecraft Anti-Addiction Resource Pack.

The core function of this resource pack is to guide players to develop healthy gaming habits by reasonably limiting their game time. It is based on the 'regional_compliancies.json' file mechanism in the Minecraft game to scientifically plan the player's playing time. This file was originally designed to meet the legal compliance requirements of some regions and is used to control the in-game play timer and tooltip text. We've optimized and expanded on this to make it more effective at reminding players to take breaks and avoid long periods of continuous play.

After installing this resource pack, players will see a clear message when entering the game, informing them of the recommended duration of the game. As the game progresses, the system will send out warm rest reminders at regular intervals, encouraging players to step away from the screen for a while and engage in appropriate activities such as stretching, hydration, etc. When the player approaches the set maximum game time, a more obvious warning will pop up on the game screen, indicating that the player is about to end the game. These tips are designed to be friendly and relatable, and are designed to guide rather than force players to manage their game time wisely.

We understand that games aren't beasts on their own, and that a modest gaming experience can be fun, creative, and develop teamwork and problem-solving skills. Therefore, the goal of this resource pack is not to completely ban players from playing the game, but to help players establish a healthy concept of gaming through scientific guidance and reasonable restrictions, so that Minecraft can become a positive form of entertainment, rather than a source of addiction.

During the development process, we fully respect the player's gaming experience and ensure that the operation of the resource pack does not have any negative impact on the normal gameplay and performance of the game. At the same time, we also pay attention to protecting the privacy and data security of our players, and will not collect or disclose any personal information of our players.

In short, this Minecraft anti-addiction resource pack is an active exploration of our care for players and advocating the concept of healthy games. We hope that it can be a bridge between players and the game, helping everyone to enjoy the game while maintaining a good state of life and learning. Let's work together to create a healthy and harmonious gaming environment!
